team.name: Mir Faizan
team.title: Founder & Chief Executive Officer
team.bio:
Mir Faizan is the Founder and CEO of Horizon Physician Services LLC, a trusted healthcare solutions company specializing in Workers’ Compensation Management, Medical Billing, Medical Coding, Provider Credentialing, and Revenue Cycle Management. With a strong commitment to excellence, compliance, and operational efficiency, he helps healthcare providers optimize revenue, streamline processes, and achieve sustainable growth.

In addition to his leadership in healthcare services, Mir is the Founder and CEO of Storm Communications, a successful Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) company that has been delivering exceptional business solutions and client support services for over six years. His diverse experience across healthcare and business operations has enabled him to build high-performing teams, foster long-term partnerships, and drive measurable results.

Mission

To empower healthcare providers and businesses with innovative, reliable, and results-driven solutions that enhance performance, maximize growth, and create lasting value through excellence, integrity, and exceptional service.

team.name: Kinza Amin
team.title: Cheif operating officer
team.bio: As Chief Operating Officer, she oversees daily operations, streamlines processes, and ensures organizational efficiency. Her strong leadership, strategic planning, and commitment to excellence play a key role in driving growth and delivering exceptional service.

team.name: Aliza Amin
team.title: Chief Marketing Officer
team.bio: As the CMO, I lead the company’s marketing strategy, brand development, and promotional activities. I focus on increasing brand awareness, generating leads, and driving business growth through effective marketing campaigns and market analysis.

team.name: Ahmed Musaddiq
team.title: Senior Business Consultant
team.bio:
Ahmed Musaddiq is a Senior Consultant specializing in healthcare revenue cycle management, business operations, and organizational growth. With a strong background in client engagement, process optimization, and team development, he plays a key role in driving operational efficiency and delivering measurable results for healthcare organizations.

Working closely with executive leadership, Ahmed contributes to the development and execution of strategic initiatives that enhance revenue performance, streamline workflows, and improve overall service delivery. His expertise spans medical billing operations, client relations, workforce development, and business process improvement, enabling organizations to achieve sustainable growth while maintaining the highest standards of compliance and quality.

Throughout his career, Ahmed has built a reputation for combining analytical thinking with a practical, results-oriented approach. He is passionate about helping healthcare providers navigate complex revenue cycle challenges, strengthen operational performance, and unlock new opportunities for success.

As a trusted advisor to clients and stakeholders, Ahmed remains committed to innovation, continuous improvement, and delivering exceptional value across every aspect of healthcare operations.

team.name: Rizwan
team.title: HR Director
team.bio: Driving talent development, employee engagement, and organizational excellence through strategic human resource leadership and a people-first approach.
